title: Bolloré Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bolloré Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
